s2_title: Análise de Desempenho de Plataformas de Processamento de Grafos
tldr: Os resultados experimentais obtidos contribuem com diretivas para que os interessados possam melhor elencar a plataforma de processamento de grafos mais eficiente a seus interesses de análise.

s2_title: Concepção e Desenvolvimento de um Serviço Distribuído de Coleta e Tratamento de Dados para Ambientes de Internet das Coisas
tldr: This paper proposes a data management approach within an IoT environment, thus contributing with the specification of functionalities and the conception of techniques for collecting, filtering and storing data conveniently and efficiently.

s2_title: Detecção semi-supervisionada de posicionamento em tweets baseada em regras de sentimento
tldr: A semi-supervised method to identify stance based on positive or negative opinions of targets directly or indirectly related and the resulting predictive model allows to predict the stance of unlabeled tweets.

s2_title: Geração de um Perfil de Qualidade Para Fontes de Dados Dinâmicas
tldr: This work addresses the problem of performing assessment continuously, looking to dynamic data sources, and proposes the creation of a data source Quality Profile, which consists of a set of metadata about the data source’s quality and may be used to help the selection of data sources.

s2_title: gSSJoin: a GPU-based Set Similarity Join Algorithm
tldr: This paper investigates strategies to accelerate set similarity join using Graphic Processing Units (GPUs) and exploits massive parallelism instead of filtering and, as a result, exhibits much better robustness to variations of threshold values and data distributions.

s2_title: Identifying Sentiment-Based Contradictions
tldr: This paper adapted and extended an existing contradiction analysis framework by filtering its results to remove the reviews that are erroneously labeled as contradictory, based on two simple term similarity algorithms.

s2_title: Um Repositório Chave-Valor com Controle de Localidade
tldr: ALOCS is presented, a distributed repository which adopts the key-value model, allowing the user application to control the allocation of data into servers, to allow the application to co-allocate data that are frequently used together.

s2_title: Análise da Contribuição para Código entre Repositórios do GitHub
tldr: To analyze the contribution of repositories of different programming languages, analyze the correlation between languages, and draw interesting profiles from such an interesting data repository.

s2_title: Análise de métodos de Inferência Ecológica em dados de redes sociais
tldr: The results show that it is possible to infer gender and age using only a census and aggregated information obtained from a social network such as aggregated support for a political candidate.

s2_title: Automatic Physical Design Tuning based on Hypothetical Plans
tldr: This paper introduces a new approach, denoted HypoPlans, to make relational database systems able to execute self-tuning actions, based on the notion of Hypothetical Query Execution Plans, which is non-intrusive and completely autonomous.

s2_title: Avaliação Empírica de Técnicas de Comparação Privada Aplicadas na Resolução de Entidades
tldr: The results indicate that the use of HAC in non-textual data comparison can improve the accuracy of PPRL Resumo and evaluates if Homomorphic Asymmetric Cryptography (HAC) can improveThe accuracy of the comparison involving non- Textual private data.

s2_title: BERT: Melhorando Classificação de Texto com Árvores Extremamente Aleatórias, Bagging e Boosting
tldr: This work proposes to improve the BROOF strategy by exploiting Extremely Randomized Trees (Extra-Trees) as a “weak learner” in the boosting framework, and introduces the Bagging procedure into the Extra-Tree models so that it can estimate a better Out-of-Bag (OOB) error when compared to the originalBROOF.

s2_title: Busca por Similaridade no CassandraDB: Particionamento, Recuperação Eficiente e Planejamento Experimental
tldr: This work proposes to overcome this limitation by extending Cassandra with similarity search capabilities by using locality sensitive hashing to spread data to nodes, to target nodes for queries, and for efficiently recovering similar data from stable storage at the nodes.

s2_title: Combinando semi-supervisão e hubness para aprimorar o agrupamento de dados em alta dimensão
tldr: This paper presents a clustering approach that explores the combination of two strategies: semi-supervision and density estimation based on hubness scores based onHubness scores that shows a good performance when applied on real data sets with different characteristics.

s2_title: Construção de Linked Data Mashup para Integração de Dados da Saúde Pública
tldr: From this process, it was possible to obtain an integrated-view of the bases previously isolated, useful for analyzing the correlation between mother’s information during pregnancy with deaths and anomalies in newborns.

s2_title: Dinâmica de Temas Abordados no Twitter Via Evolução de Clusters
tldr: This paper proposes to monitor and analyze postings during time windows via clusters evolution, and demonstrates that the proposal is a promising solution to monitor subjects evolution patterns over time.

s2_title: Equivalência entre a Área sob a Curva Kolmogorov-Smirnov e o Índice de Gini na Avaliação de Desempenho de Decisões Binárias
tldr: This paper proposes and proves the important equivalence between the Gini index and the area under the Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) distribution curve, and proves that theGini index ratio to that of the ideal classifier is equivalent to the areaUnder the KS curve ratio tothat of its ideal classifiers.

s2_title: Explorando o Uso de Short-term Memory na Construção de Métodos de Acesso Métricos Mais Eficientes
tldr: A new approach to create the metric access method Slim-tree through a short-term memory is proposed and the preliminary experiments resulted in less distance calculations, disk accesses and execution time to run k-nearest neighbor queries.

s2_title: Fast and Scalable Relational Division on Database Systems
tldr: The results showed that the implementation for the relational division is potentially faster than the best implementation in SQL, and a new algorithm for the division is presented, which is implemented through stored procedures.

s2_title: Features Fusion for Diversity Gap Reduction
tldr: Multiodal fusion approaches aimed at reducing the diversity gap with ensemble clustering and dimensionality reduction with the potential to boost diversity-oriented engines and to improve state-of-the-art systems are presented.

s2_title: Gerência de Incerteza em Bancos de Dados de Proveniência de Workflows de Bioinformática
tldr: This paper addresses the management of non-deterministicprovenance data by relying on an extractor component that stores both provenance data and its corresponding uncertainty values in a probabilistic database.

s2_title: Hardware-aware Database Systems: A New Era for Database Technology is Coming - Vision Paper
tldr: This paper presents and defends the idea of hardware-aware database systems in order to make database systems able to fully exploit the advantages provided by new hardware, such as solid state memories.

s2_title: Impacto da amostragem aleatória uniforme para o aumento da escalabilidade na geração de agrupamentos hierárquicos de séries espaço-temporais
tldr: O experimento indica que e necessario o desenvolvimento de uma estrategia mais eficiente que a selecao ingenua de amostras (amostragem uniforme) para reducao da numerosidade de tempo de execucao e espaco do algoritmo.

s2_title: Interoperabilidade Semântica entre Sistemas de Resposta a Emergências
tldr: A proposal for data integration for Emergency Response Systems (ERS) using a suite of ontologies created based on the EDXL (Emergency Data Exchange Language) standard, indicating that EDXL is suitable in local scenario and that the ontologies can be applied as interlingua among ERS.

s2_title: Interoperability of Conceptual Geographical Data Schemas using UML Infrastructure
tldr: This paper proposes a method to reach horizontal interoperability, i.e., a schema can be transformed in another schema designed using a different model, using UML infrastructure and the Enterprise Architect CASE tool.

s2_title: Medindo o tamanho da caixinha de surpresas em ligas de futebol
tldr: An analysis of soccer leagues that follow the double round-robin tournament system quantifies the notion that football is a box of surprises and allows one to measure to what extent a championship is more surprising than others.

s2_title: Passenger density and flow analysis and city zones and bus stops classification for public bus service management
tldr: Analysis of data obtained from passengers smart cards, buses GPS and bus stops geolocation using Lambda Architecture approach gives greater insight into the volume and flow of passengers and the real existing demand for bus services, facilitating its control and management, allowing decision-making.

s2_title: Recomendação de reviews personalizada para donos de estabelecimentos
tldr: This work proposes using the review’s aspects and sentiments, and generating a rank ordered by the most useful reviews from the establishment management and developing point of view, to evaluate the usefulness of a review from the owner's perspective.

s2_title: S2I+: Armazenamento Eficiente em Índice Espaco-Textual
tldr: New strategies to reduce the size of S2I are studied, maintaining the good performance aspects of the index, and novas estratégias are proposed for reduzir the tamanho of S 2I are proposed.

s2_title: SelfBI: Tomada de decisão sob demanda do usuário utilizando dados da Web
tldr: The work is to propose an OLAP operator capable of integrating situational data from social media to user queries at the right time; this is, when the user needs them for decision making.

s2_title: Spatial Sequential Pattern Mining for Seismic Data
tldr: This work discretizes continuous values into symbols and adapt well known sequential algorithm to mine spatial-time dataset to better understand the quality of the identified patterns, and visualize them over the original seismic traces images.

s2_title: The Strength of Social Coding Collaboration on GitHub
tldr: The goal is to analyze the correlation between network properties and such strength, e.g., the collaborations strength, that may help to improve the recommendation of developers and the evaluation of team formation in GitHub.

s2_title: Treinamento Supervisionado para Previsão de Partidas de Futebol: Uma Abordagem usando Dados de Videogames
tldr: This paper presents an approach to predict soccer match outcomes using for it the FIFA game data to obtain data and information through the large and wide video game industry.

s2_title: Uma Estratégia para Seleção de Atributos Relevantes no Processo de Resolução de Entidades
tldr: The proposed strategy considers criteria related to data, such as density and repetition of values of each attribute, and related to sources,  such as reliability, to evaluate the relevance of the attributes to be considered in the instance comparison phase of the process of Entity Resolution.

s2_title: Use of graphs and taxonomic classifications to analyze content relationships among courseware
tldr: The goal of this project is to design and develop a suite of tools to assist users to find, analyze and select pieces of educational content that are relevant to their learning goals.

s2_title: Uso de Anotações Semânticas para Exploração de Paralelismo em Workflows Intensivos em Dados
Message from the HCSC Organizing Committee
venue: Annual International Computer Software and Applications Conference

s2_title: A Framework for Online Clustering Based on Evolving Semi-Supervision
tldr: The experimental results show the potential of the proposed framework called CABESS (Cluster Adaptation Based on Evolving Semi-supervision), for online clustering, and show that the framework is faster than traditional semi-supervised clustering algorithms using lower standard semi- supervision.

s2_title: A Spline-based Cost Model for Metric Trees
tldr: The Stockpile model is proposed for cost estimation of similarity queries on metric trees by using pivot-based distance histograms that represent the local densities around the query elements that provide a fair estimation of both disk accesses and distance calculations.

s2_title: Analyzing the Performance of Spatial Indices on Hard Disk Drives and Flash-based Solid State Drives
tldr: It is shown experimentally that spatial indices originally designed for HDDs should be redesigned for SSDs in order to take into account the intrinsic characteristics of SSDs.
venue: Journal of Information and Data Management

s2_title: Explorando arquiteturas multi-core para processamento eficiente de consultas em sistemas de gerência de Big Data
tldr: The results show that increasing the I/O parallelism in terms of data nodes is not always the most effective strategy, and reinforces the idea of using worker nodes in the query processing pipeline.

s2_title: Extração de Dados de Conferências a Partir da Web
tldr: This paper presents a method developed to retrieve and extract data from conferences web sites that combines the identification of conference URL and deadline extraction and reports on experiments that evaluate the quality of the extracted data.

s2_title: Identificação do grafo de genealogia acadêmica de pesquisadores: Uma abordagem baseada na Plataforma Lattes
tldr: The contribution of the work relies on the precision of the hierarchical structure of academic advisor-advisee relationships resulting from the algorithm (graph), which facilitates genealogical analysis.

s2_title: Ligações Semânticas Utilizando Predicados SKOS
tldr: This work proposes a type of semantic enrichment between glossaries, using SKOS vocabulary and SPARQL queries, which suggests that automatic methods can be used to improve a quality of terminological mappings.

s2_title: ParallelNACluster: Uma estratégia paralela de clusterização para o casamento de múltiplos catálogos
tldr: A parallel version of NACluster is created that takes advantage of input data partitioning, and accepts large volumes of data even using a small hardware set, and proposes the SCIBoundary, a new strategy for matching neighboring stars placed in different data partitions.

s2_title: Particionamento como Ação de Sintonia Fina em Bancos de Dados Relacionais
tldr: Heuristics that select a partitioning strategy for each table and estimate their workload benefits are presented and it is shown that partitioning can be effectively used as a first-order database tuning technique.

s2_title: Relational graph data management on the edge: Grouping vertices' neighborhood with Edge-k
tldr: Edge-k is proposed, a novel storage approach that combines additional columns in the edges table, allowing to tune the number of edges stored in a single row by taking into account the overall neighborhood of the vertices, thus providing a better table organization.

s2_title: STACY: Um Novo Algoritmo para Automaticamente Classificar a Força dos Relacionamentos ao Longo dos Anos
tldr: A new algorithm (STACY) is proposed to automatically classify tie strength in eight different classes by considering the temporal aspect, and results show: such classes represent different behaviors, and STACY identifies strong relationships that persist more than the ones classified by a state of the state.

s2_title: Um Survey sobre Soluções para Publicação de Dados na Web sob a Perspectiva das Boas Práticas do W3C
tldr: This work presents a survey and analysis of Data on the Web publishing solutions with regards to the Data on The Web Best Practices recommended by the W3C, and presents a comparison of the most commonly used solutions.

s2_title: Uma Avaliação de Eficiência e Eficácia da Combinação de Técnicas para Deduplicação de Dados
tldr: This work presents an experimental evaluation using real and artificial datasets to find the best combination for such algorithms aiming to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the deduplication process as a whole.

s2_title: Uma Proposta de Perfil de Conjuntos de Dados na Web com Enriquecimento Semântico
tldr: This paper proposes an approach that describes datasets on the Web by the generation of a semantically enriched descriptive and structural metadata profile by means of the knowledge domain identification of the dataset at hand and a vocabulary recommendation in order to semantically reference the data.

tldr: This paper presents Rendezvous, a middleware that addresses workload-adaptive management of large RDF graphs with a caching strategy for SPARQL query results, and provides a novel RDF data partitioning approach based on a fragmentation strategy that maps RDFData into multiple NoSQL databases.

s2_title: A Força dos Relacionamentos Pode Medir a Qualidade de Comunidades?
tldr: This paper evaluates whether strength metrics can also be used to measure the quality of algorithms that detect communities, and results are positive to confirm such hypothesis.

s2_title: A Predictive Load Balancing Service for Cloud-Replicated Databases
tldr: This paper proposes a predictive load balancing service for replicated cloud databases that can be used to improve the computational resources utilization of cloud applications resorting to databases.

s2_title: Análise da evolução, impacto e formação de redes nos cinco anos do BraSNAM

tldr: Uma análise comparativa em termos de desempenho das abordagens de consulta de dados produzidos por uma simulação em dinâmica de fluı́dos computacional foi realizada.

s2_title: Análise do Impacto do Gerador de Conjuntos de Dados em Experimentos de Deduplicação de Dados
tldr: Results show that two parameters explain the largest variation of results, and which parameters and levels impact more on the results of deduplication experiments created with the most used tool is verified.

s2_title: Aspectos Temporais para Medir a Força da Colaboração no GitHub
tldr: The results show the temporal aspect enables to build a more realistic collaboration graph and enable to construir a graf de colaboração mais realista between GitHub developers.

s2_title: Detecção de Anomalias no Transporte Rodoviário Urbano
tldr: A baseline for anomaly identification in urban mobility is established, which may be found useful for developing new approaches that provide a better comprehension of urban mobility systems.

s2_title: Don't Keep My UDFs Hostage - Exporting UDFs For Debugging Purposes
tldr: This paper presents an extension to the open-source database system MonetDB that allows developers to debug their UDFs using modern debugging techniques.

s2_title: Empirical evaluation of strategies to process range queries of numeric sequences in batch-mode
tldr: The results indicate that for inputs modelled as a random walk distribution the overall best implemented strategy for grouping queries is indeed the one unifying all queries in a single group.

s2_title: Estratégia Distribuída para Análise de Assuntos Abordados no Twitter Via Evolução de Clusters
tldr: This paper proposes a more scalable strategy for analyzing the evolution of subjects in social networks, through the use of a distributed solution in the data clustering stage, and demonstrates that the proposed solution is promising, presenting considerable gains in performance.

s2_title: Mineração de Perfis Sociais em Redes Temporais
tldr: A mining method capable of identifying and recovering social profiles from topological aspects in temporal networks is proposed and allows the identification of persistent profiles and explicit patterns that suggest relationship models in social networks.

s2_title: Mineração de Regras de Associação Multirrelação em Grafos: Direcionando o Processo de Busca
tldr: This work presents an adaptation of the MRAR algorithm based on the search mask concept, which is used to direct the mining process in order to find rules that can really be useful to the user in a shorter time.

s2_title: Online Performance Modeling for NoSQL Databases using Extreme Learning Machines
tldr: Experimental results confirm that the performance modeling can accurately predict throughput under several scenarios and is suitable for NoSQL databases using extreme learning machines.

s2_title: Redes Sociais Científicas: análise topológica da influência dos pesquisadores
tldr: A bidirectional graph-based model is proposed to analyzed the influence between researchers, and two algorithms are used to analyze the network structure, to identify scientific communities and to locate multidisciplinary researchers.

s2_title: Spark Scalability Analysis in a Scientific Workflow
tldr: It is shown that Spark scales very well when running long-lasting scientific tasks, but its performance is lower for short-duration tasks.

s2_title: Spatial Join on Positional Uncertain Data
tldr: A probabilistic spatial join on positional uncertain data designed to be a) generalist; b) accurate and c) efficient is presented, i.e., it is not outperformed by any competing method.

s2_title: Uma abordagem para monitoramento de anuros baseada em processamento digital de sinais bioacústicos
Uma Análise Comparativa entre Sistemas Gerenciadores de Bancos de Dados NoSQL no contexto de Internet das Coisas
tldr: This paper aims to analyze the performance of nonrelational Database Management Systems (DBMS) inside the IoT context, using a real IoT dataset, to show each DBMS has characteristics that make it the recommendation to a specific scenario, depending on the application's objective.

s2_title: Uso de instâncias de dados e carga de trabalho para mineração de restrições de integridade
tldr: This work explores the automatic discovery of FDs and describes a method for selecting relevant ones regarding workload semantics and shows that the selected dependencies exhibit expressive properties compared to the search space, which demonstrates the effectiveness of this approach.

s2_title: Message from the CAP 2017 Organizing Committee
venue: Annual International Computer Software and Applications Conference

s2_title: WANQA: uma Abordagem para Identificar Novas Questões Não Respondíveis em Comunidades de Perguntas e Respostas
tldr: This article proposes an approach based on a classification that results a model able to classify whether a new question is answerable or not and uses features available in most CQAs.

s2_title: SmartLTM: Smart Larger-Than-Memory Storage for Hybrid Database Systems
tldr: This work proposes SmartL TM, a data eviction mechanism that considers the decisions previously taken by the DBMS in optimizing data storage according to query workload, and experiments show that cold data access with SmartLTM incurs an acceptable 17% of throughput loss, against 26% of the row-based one.

s2_title: Armazenamento Otimizado de Dados RDF em um SGBD Relacional
tldr: An experimental study shows that AORR improves the overall query performance, compared to a close related work, and differs from related work by supporting SPARQL to SQL query translation as well as dynamic data insertions.

tldr: A computational framework to identify the social reputation of a researcher or a study, based on alternative impact metrics (altmetrics) is created, which will help to identify experts and to recognize how citizens interpret the efficiency of professionals and their efforts to find solutions.

s2_title: Meta-alinhamento de Ontologias Utilizando a Abordagem Presa-predador
tldr: This work presents an ontology meta-matcher that combines several ontology matchers making use of the evolutionary meta-heuristic prey-predator as a means of parameterization of the same.

tldr: Options to choose terms in the blocking step based on their relevance to the dataset in the phases of blocking and processing of blocks are proposed, increasing the efficiency and comparing it against relevant works available in the literature.

tldr: A new operator for the StreamPref language that can be employed to obtain the top-k data stream sequences according to temporal conditional preferences is presented and shows that the proposed operator has a superior performance when compared to the equivalent operation in CQL.

s2_title: Point pattern search in big data
tldr: This paper proposes practically efficient sequential and distributed algorithms for pure, isotropic, and non-isotropic constellation queries, believed to be the first work to address isotropics and non -isotropic queries.
venue: International Conference on Statistical and Scientific Database Management

s2_title: Emotion Analysis of Reaction to Terrorism on Twitter
tldr: Results showed an emotion shift due to the events and a difference on the reaction from one event to another, which can help in defining specific assistance programs.

s2_title: PrivLBS: uma Abordagem para Preservação de Privacidade de Dados em Serviços baseados em Localização
tldr: Experimental results show that, for euclidean distance-based attacks, individual’s probability of location re-identification, after using PrivLBS, is around 11.4%, whereas in existing work, this probability reaches 59.2%.

s2_title: Correlating Educational Documents from Different Sources Through Graphs and Taxonomies
tldr: CIMAL is presented, a framework for enabling flexible access to material stored in arbitrary repositories that combines semantic classification, taxonomies and graphs to elicit relationships among topics of educational documents.

s2_title: Caracterização e Comparação das Campanhas do Outubro Rosa e Novembro Azul no Twitter
tldr: It is identified that these campaigns have reached their target audience, i.e. men and women over 40 years of age, and patterns in the activities throughout the respective period within campaigns are discovered.

s2_title: Análise de Colaboração em Desenvolvimento Global de Software
tldr: This work aims to detect experts and to identify groups with experienced members in some topics in Q&A forums to achieve these goals and uses NetSCAN algorithm to detect overlapping communities in social networks.

s2_title: Caracterização Topológica de Redes Viárias por Meio da Análise de Vetores de Características e Técnicas de Agrupamento
tldr: It is shown how the joint of features from complexnetwork metrics can describe urban indicators that are rooted in the network topology and how they can reveal differences among cities.

s2_title: Workload-aware Parameter Selection and Performance Prediction for In-memory Databases
tldr: This work proposes a learning-based approach to select the most meaningful parameters and generate a performance model based on both the workload and the database configurations, and experimental results confirm that this approach can create accurate performance models using only a reduced set of selected parameters.

s2_title: Database Tuning with Partial Indexes
tldr: This paper proposes an optimized strategy to select partial indexes for database tuning and explains how to select the indexable attributes and their corresponding restrictions through a formal procedure.

s2_title: FLEXMVCC: uma Abordagem Flexível para Protocolos de Controle de Concorrência Multi-versão
tldr: The FLEXMVCC is created, which integrates two compatible multi-version concurrency control protocols, an optimistic one and a pessimistic one, able to adapt as the workload changes, and preliminary experiments show that the exchange between protocols is feasible and results in a performance gain over static protocols.

tldr: Os workflows emergiram como uma abstracao basica para estrutu-  rar experimentos de analise de dados no atual cenario de DISC, o que torna dificil a explora-  cao das oportunidades de otimizacao.

s2_title: FReeP: towards Parameter Recommendation in Scientific Workflows using Preference Learning
tldr: A preliminary experimental evaluation showed the feasibility of FReeP to recommend parameter values for scientific workflows, a parameter recommendation algorithm that suggests a value to a parameter that agrees with the user preferences.

s2_title: Time Series Forecasting for Purposes of Irrigation Management Process

s2_title: Uma Abordagem para Caracterização de documentos RDF através de Esquemas Conceituais
tldr: The goal is to characterize an RDF data structure through an entityrelationship schema and its constructors through a method to extract conceptual schemas from RDF documents.

s2_title: Pytology: rumo ao Cálculo de Relevância sobre Dados RDF

s2_title: Processamento de Consultas SPARQL em uma Base Relacional de Entidades
tldr: This paper proposes a method for translating SPARQL queries to SQL to be processed on a group-by-entity relational database, which explores structural similarity to group sets of triples in a single line of a relation.

s2_title: GovDadosMB: um Framework de Governança de Dados Corporativos para a Marinha do Brasil
tldr: A comparative analysis between data governance frameworks is presented and a framework adapted to the Navy is proposed, called GovDadosMB, with a focus on the interoperability of personnel management data.

s2_title: LinkedECG: uma Abordagem para a Integração e Publicação de Dados de Eletrocardiograma
tldr: An approach is proposed for ECG feature extraction (resulting from signal processing), ECG data integration and publishing following the main standards related to open data sharing on the web, in order to support, using Web environment, complex queries, execution of mining algorithms, and also enable collaboration among specialists.

s2_title: Investigando a Relação das Refatorações de Código com os Sentimentos de Mensagens de Commit
tldr: An analysis of feelings in messages expressed by developers through commits in code repositories concludes that when working with refactorings, the tendency is to express fewer negative feelings.

tldr: The impact of theUse of the k-neighbors algorithm faced to the use of the mean in the global imputation process as well as to explore the Use of the hot-deck imputation technique with the clustering algorithm k-Means and imputation with k-NN are evaluated.

s2_title: Uma Estratégia Eficiente de Treinamento para Programação Genética Aplicada a Deduplicação de Registros
tldr: A novel approach for training step based on clustering technique combined with a sliding window aims at minimize the number of comparisons required in the training step without affecting its results.

s2_title: Detecção de Anomalias Frequentes no Transporte Rodoviário Urbano
tldr: O crescimento da populac¸ ˜ao urbana e, consequentemente, do n´umero  de ve´iculos provoca o aumento de engarrafamentos e da emiss˜ao de ga-  ses poluentes.

s2_title: Arquitetura para Cocuradoria de Dados de Conhecimento Popular Integrados por meio de Linked Open Data
tldr: This work presents an architecture to support the co-curation of data derived from popular knowledge, and provides the interconnection between visitors’ contributions with data already available in open repositories on the web (in the Linked Open Data format).

s2_title: Utilização de Redes Heterogêneas para Medir a Força dos Relacionamentos no GitHub
tldr: The contributions include a new heterogeneous graph model with different types of interactions and new metrics for the strength of such relationships and the results show the proposed metrics bring new information about the relationships.

s2_title: Anonimização de Streaming de Dados em DOCA
tldr: This work proposes DOCA, a differentially private approach for publishing data streaming in non-interactive scenarios using an online microaggregation strategy to obtain better utility.

s2_title: Um Estudo Comparativo entre Algoritmos de Proteção da Privacidade Aplicado à Bases de Dados na Área de Saúde
tldr: Data anonymization and perturbation techniques are considered and compared, assessing their efficiency in providing privacy and safety of shared data, more specifically, when applied to databases of the health field.

s2_title: XXXIII Simpósio Brasileiro de Banco de Dados, SBBD 2018, Rio de Janeiro, RJ, Brazil, August 25-26, 2018
Welcome from the organizing committee
TRiER: A Fast and Scalable Method for Mining Temporal Exception Rules
tldr: This work proposes TRiER (TempoRal Exception Ruler), an efficient method for mining temporal exception rules that not only discover unusual behaviors and their causative agents, but also identifies how long consequences take to appear.

s2_title: A Multi-Strategy Approach to Overcoming Bias in Community Detection Evaluation
tldr: The main contribution of this paper is an approach that supports a robust quality evaluation when detecting communities in real-world networks, using multiple strategies that capture distinct aspects of the communities.

s2_title: In-class social networks and academic performance: how good connections can improve grades
tldr: Analysis of the impact on academic performance of social indicators such as students friendship circle and in-class clustering indicates that students with higher social capital tend to perform better, and students with friends with higher grades have better chances of recovering from a low exam grade.

s2_title: Uma Análise Experimental do Impacto da Seleção de Atributos em Processos de Resolução de Entidades
tldr: Experimental work evaluates the attribute selection impact over the complete ER process by performing experiments over real and synthetic datasets from different domains and shows attribute selection affects the ER effectiveness by up to 92%.

s2_title: Refinamento Colaborativo de Dados na Web baseado em Social Coding
tldr: This work proposes a refinement strategy based on the principles of social coding to allow the refinement of datasets published on the Web in a democratic environment.

s2_title: Evolution-based Refinement of Cross-language Ontology Alignments
tldr: This article proposes a refinement technique to enable the update of the semantic type of the mapping such as “is-a’, “part-of”, etc, and relies on information from the ontology evolution to apply refinement actions.

s2_title: Análise Integrada de Grafos de Proveniência Heterogêneos por meio de uma Abordagem PolyStore
tldr: An approach named PolyFlow is proposed, being able to integrate multiple heterogeneous provenance databases adopting an on-demand global schema (ProvONE), i.e., it transforms the data in execution time, allowing researchers to query multiple provenance graphs via , exploring and linking provenance of different workflows.

s2_title: SAVIME: A Database Management System for Simulation Data Analysis and Visualization
tldr: This work describes the in-memory array DBMS system SAVIME, and shows how it can outperform the state-of-the-art array database system, SciDB, during the process of data ingestion and shows that it is possible to use SAVime as a storage alternative for a numerical solver without affecting its scalability.

s2_title: ETERNAL: Uma estratégia eficiente de tolerância a falhas utilizando memória não volátil
tldr: This paper proposes ETERNAL, a durability architecture that makes efficient use of nonvolatile memory, improving the process performance of persistence in main memory DBMSs and reveals that ETERNal provides a higher throughput than the write-ahead logging (WAL) approach.

s2_title: A DBMS-Based Framework for Content-Based Retrieval and Analysis of Skin Ulcer Images in Medical Practice
tldr: ULEARn, a DBMS-based framework for the processing of ulcer images, providing tools to store and retrieve similar images of past cases and the proposed mobile application ULEARs-App allows healthcare practitioners to send a photo from a patient to ULEarn, and obtain a timely feedback that allows the improvement of procedures on therapeutic interventions.

s2_title: A Parallel-based Map Matching Approach over Urban Place Records
tldr: A Spark-based map matching approach, called MATCH-UPS, that improves the precision and reduces the execution time of the map matching task between two geospatial data sources, in the Smart Cities scenario.

s2_title: Towards a Technique for Extracting Relational Actors from Monolithic Applications
tldr: The proposed technique can be seen as a first step towards supporting practitioners in decomposing OLTP systems into reactors, and applied on its predecessor monolithic version.

s2_title: Classificação de Estados Epilépticos em Sinais de EEG utilizando Detecção de Anomalias
tldr: Three models based on anomaly detection of epileptic patterns in the EEG signal are proposed, demonstrating high performance and noise robustness in relation to results found in the literature and motivating the development of algorithms that can identify these patterns, aiding the medical diagnosis.

s2_title: Artigo Visão: Processamento de Banco de Dados em Memória
tldr: Neste artigo, apresentamos nossa visão de como os Sistemas Gerenciadores de Bancos de Dados (SGBD) podem integrar Processamento-emMemória (PIM) em processamento de consultas y resultados promissores chegando a reduzir em 3× o tempo of execução of consultas and o consumo of energia.

s2_title: Explorando o uso de árvores B+ na Indexação de Dados por Similaridade
tldr: Un novo método de indexação métrico denominado GroupSim+ permite um maior estreitamento das regiões mı́nimas de poda que contribui para a otimização de consultas por similaridade.

s2_title: Fake News and Brazilian politics - temporal investigation based on semantic annotations and graph analysis
tldr: A new approach based on semantic annotations and graph analysis is employed to study fake news articles about Brazilian politics in a two year time span and indicates that fake news tend to be influenced by public interest.

s2_title: Modelo Autorregressivo de Integração Adaptativa
tldr: This article introduces and analyzes a new linear model applied to stationary time series that are built by using adaptive normalization, able to present superior prediction performance to other linear models consolidated in the literature, specially in short-term horizons.

s2_title: Industrial Paper: Large-scale Record Linkage of Web-based Place Entities
tldr: This paper presents a practical approach for solving the record linkage problem in the places data domain at an industrial scale, displaying both a model which reaches a normalized Gini coefficient of 0.92, and an architecture that supports large-scale processing.

s2_title: Short Paper: Descoberta automática de restrições de negação confiáveis
tldr: This work proposes a method that discovers reliable DCs based on evidence of the tuples of a dataset, even if the dataset has errors, and shows that it is possible to find DCs that point to inconsistencies of the input data.

s2_title: Visualização dos dados abertos da Polícia Rodoviária Federal sobre acidentes nas rodovias brasileiras
tldr: An open-source prototype for the visualization of open data provided by Polı́cia Rodoviária Federal (PRF), mapping historically the most dangerous sections of the highways, the most frequent causes of accidents, and helps to identify patterns.

s2_title: Conformity Analysis of GTFS Routes and Bus Trajectories
tldr: This paper provides a conformity analysis of GTFS routes and bus positioning data from multiple cities and finds inconsistencies related to GPS route labels and GT FS routes and enumerates the main inconsistencies found in data analysis.

s2_title: Comunicação em bloco na exploração de grafos em bases RDF distribuídas
tldr: The proposed communication strategy has been implemented on a SPARQL query processor based on a graph exploration algorithm and experimental results showed that block-based communication can improve the performance of distributed query processing.

s2_title: Achieving Differential Privacy in Smart Home Scenarios
tldr: This work proposes a differentially private strategy to estimate frequencies of values in the context of Smart Home data.

s2_title: A Science Gateway to Support Research in Spectral Graph Theory
tldr: This paper proposes RioGraphX, a science gateway developed on top of Apache Spark, which aims to obtain all graphs that optimize a given mathematical function of the eigenvalues of a graph.

s2_title: Análise de Hiperparâmetros em Aplicações de Aprendizado Profundo por meio de Dados de Proveniência
tldr: A CNNProv adota o padrão W3C PROV para representar relacionamentos de derivação de dados para facilitar a análise das combinações de hiperparâmetros, contribuindo assim para a fase of treinamento das CNNs.

s2_title: Processamento Eficiente de Consultas Analíticas Estendidas com Predicado de Similaridade em Spark
tldr: The BrOmnImg method is proposed, which efficiently solves the efficient processing of analytical queries extended with a similarity search predicate since these queries have a high computational cost in Spark.

s2_title: Data Warehouse Educacional: Uma visão sobre a Evasão no Ensino Superior
tldr: The presented Data Warehouse allows integrated views that assist in analysis such as distribution of students’ performance coefficient; 2) identification of student profiles and 3) insight into student achievement by locality to assist academic management in identifying patterns that lead to dropout.

s2_title: Definindo e Predizendo Níveis de Saúde de Colônias de Abelhas via Clusterização e Classificação
tldr: A solution for calculating bee colony health status levels using data from internal and external colony sensors and onsite inspections by beekeepers and a prediction model to create a classification model is presented.

s2_title: Desenvolvimento de Modelos de Armazenamento em Sensores com Reutilização de Código
tldr: This artigo investiga a aplicação of um modelo de componentes para a geração de código para os dispositivos sensores, com a elaboração do framework RCBM-S (RCBM for Sensor devices).

s2_title: Um Estudo Comparativo de Mecanismos de Privacidade Diferencial sobre um Dataset de Ocorrências do ZIKV no Brasil
tldr: Un estudo apresenta um estudo que compara a aplicação de diferentes mecanismos de PD sobre os dados extraídos do GAL, o gerenciador de Ambiente Laboratorial no Brasil.

s2_title: Uma Análise Experimental da Utilização de Diferentes Tecnologias de Armazenamento em um SGBD Relacional
tldr: This work proposes to analyze a DBMS that stores its data in four different ways, in HDD, SSD NVM, DRAM and in a hybrid way, using the three devices together.

s2_title: Unsupervised Rank Fusion for Diverse Image Metasearch
tldr: The experimental findings suggest metasearch based on rank aggregation allows significant improvements, both in terms of relevance and diversity, both in terms of relevance and diversity.

s2_title: Differentially Private Group-by Data Releasing Algorithm
tldr: This work proposes a differentially private group-by algorithm for data publication under the exponential mechanism that publishes data groups according to a specified attribute while maintaining the desired privacy level and trustworthy utility results.

s2_title: Agregação Não Supervisionada de Rankings para Redução de Cold-Start em Recuperação Multimodal de Imagens
tldr: Aiming at attenuating the cold-start problem and improving the initial set, this work experimentally evaluated several rank aggregation methods to combine results obtained with different image ranking features to show promising effectiveness.

s2_title: Refinamento do Conjunto Inicial de Resultados baseado em Contexto para Recuperação Interativa de Imagens
tldr: The exploitation of contextual information is proposed to refine the initial set of results in interactive image retrieval systems, given it considers the rich information present in the relationships between multiple images, rather than simply using traditional methods that computes pairwise distances between two images.

s2_title: Quality metrics for diversified similarity searching: What they stand for?
tldr: The Diversity Features Model (DFM) is proposed that combines the perspectives of the competing approaches into a multidimensional point whose features are calculated based on the distance distribution within both retrieved and queried datasets.

s2_title: Achieving GDPR Compliance through Provenance: An Extended Model
tldr: This paper suggests eleven new changes that make theGDPR data provenance model more apparent and more compatible with the GDPR text, and presents two design patterns that should guide us in using these changes in real contexts.

s2_title: Temporal Evolution of Complex Data
tldr: This paper proposes to map the metric data to multidimensional spaces so that it is possible to estimate the element's status at a given time, based on known states of the same element, and applies similarity queries using this position as query center.

s2_title: Integrando Bases Autônomas Externas no Processamento de Consultas em Bases RDF Distribuídas
tldr: This article proposes an alternative to the federated architecture, called FeSHyD, which explores a distributed proprietary base, allowing its servers to communicate with third-party databases during the query processing.

s2_title: Método para rotular Ligações Semânticas na Web de Dados
tldr: This paper presents a method to label this type of relation between datasets, through the use of ontologies and controlled vocabularies, and presents the WEB application called PLAIN that implements it, and a case study demonstrating the feasibility and functionality of the proposed approach.

s2_title: A Framework for Set Similarity Join on Multi-Attribute Data
tldr: A framework to enhance existing algorithms with additional filters for dealing with multi-attribute data by presenting a simple, yet effective filter based on lightweight indexes and devise a cost model to identify the best attribute ordering to reduce processing time.

s2_title: Harbinger: Um framework para integração e análise de métodos de detecção de eventos em séries temporais
tldr: This work presents Harbinger, a framework for integration and analysis of event detection methods, evaluated with synthetic and real data, where it was possible to verify that its functionalities foster the selection of methods and the understanding of detected events.

s2_title: SmarT: Uso de Aprendizado de Máquina para Filtragem e Recuperação Eficiente de Dados Espaciais e Temporais em Big Data
tldr: The SmarT search engine is presented, a machine learning based solution that chooses the best big data system for filtering and retrieval of spatial and temporal data on the fly and was able to reduce the response time in up to 22%.

s2_title: Evaluating Database Self-Tuning Strategies in a Comon Extensible Framework
tldr: A reuseoriented framework approach towards assessing and comparing automatic relational database tuning strategies, and is made available as an open-source and extensible testbed for the database research community, thus facilitating the further evaluation of database self-tuning strategies.

s2_title: Optimized Extraction of Records from the Web Using Signal Processing and Machine Learning
tldr: The proposed optimization improves the upper bound from O(nlogn) to O(n) while maintaining the same qualitative results as before, achieving a 47% improvement in runtime efficiency when compared to the previous work and 95% f-score.

s2_title: Characterization of Anxiety, Depression, and their Comorbidity from Texts of Social Networks
tldr: Deep learning techniques are explored to develop an ensemble stacking classifier for the automatic identification of depression, anxiety, and their comorbidity, using a self-diagnosed dataset extracted from Reddit.

s2_title: Identifying and Fusing Duplicate Features for Data Mining
tldr: A simple method for duplicate detection and fusion based on a small set of features is proposed based on a small set of features and it is concluded that the investigated hypothesis does not hold.

s2_title: Criteria for choosing the number of dimensions in a principal component analysis: An empirical assessment
tldr: Results indicate Broken-Stick and Scree-Plot % criteria consistently outperformed the competitors regarding supervised-based tasks, whereas estimators Kaiser-Guttman and Scre-Plot Gap delivered poor performances in the same scenarios.

s2_title: Xi-DL: um Sistema de Gerência de Data Lake para Monitoramento de Dados da Saúde
Improving Search Quality with Automatic Ranking Evaluation and Tuning
tldr: This paper presents an Automatic Ranking Tuning and Evaluation System (ARTES) that measures the ranking performance based on users’ clicks on search resulting pages and automatically tunes the search ranking function by applying a Bayesian Optimization algorithm.

s2_title: Um Estudo Comparativo do Uso de Abordagens de Comitês de Regressão para Imputação hot-deck
tldr: A comparative study of hot-deck imputation considering two ensemble methods: Bagging and Adaboost, evaluating these methods using datasets that show different correlations between their attributes, with varying missing value rates.

s2_title: Análise de Colaboração em Processos de Negócio por meio de SGBDs de Grafos e Dados de Proveniência Multimodais
tldr: O presente artigo apresenta a abordagem MINERVA (Multimodal busINEss pRoVenance Analysis), que permite a análise de colaboração e identificaçao de pontos de melhoria em processos de negócio por meio of dados de proveniência multimodais e Bancos de Dados orientados a grafos.

s2_title: A Process for Inference of Columnar NoSQL Database Schemas
tldr: A simple solution for the inference of column data types for columnar NoSQL databases that store only byte arrays as column values, as well as a generated schema that follows the JSON Schema format is proposed.

s2_title: Indexando Impressões Digitais Utilizando Índice Invertido: Uma Investigação Inicial
tldr: This work is an initial attempt of leveraging well-established text indexing approaches and tools to fingerprint search, and first converts fingerprints into text documents using techniques such as Minutia Cylinder-Code and Locality-Sensitive Hashing, and then indexes them in inverted files using Elasticsearch, a highly scalable and distributed search engine.

s2_title: Uma abordagem para coleta e análise de dados de configurações em redes neurais profundas
tldr: Este trabalho apresenta uma abordagem centrada em dados de proveniência para enfrentar esses desafios, propondo uma coleta com flexibilidade na escolha e representação de dados a serem analisados.

s2_title: Aplicação de Top-k Reverso com Privacidade sobre os Dados Públicos de COVID-19 no Estado do Ceará
tldr: Uma consulta top-k reverso diferencialmente privada permite ao pesquisador obter dados menos frequentes de acordo com o seu critério de busca, com alta garantia de privacidade dos indivíduos that contribuíram com os dados pessoais no banco de dados original.

s2_title: Computação Serverless e Gerenciamento de Dados
Keyword Search over the COVID-19 Data
tldr: This paper first introduces a platform for data and knowledge retrieval, called DANKE, concentrating on the keyword search component, and describes an application that uses DANke to implement keyword search over two COVID-19 data scenarios.

s2_title: Query co-planning for shared execution in Key-Value Stores
tldr: This work aims to enable the shared execution of concurrent range and point queries on key-value stores by analyzing different possible data structures and proposing a variation of a segment tree, Updatable Interval Tree, which helps co-planning and co-executing multiple range queries together.

s2_title: A Novel Solution for the Aggregation Problem in Natural Language Interface to Databases (NLIDB)
tldr: This paper addresses the creation of a generic module, to be used in NLIDB systems, that allows such systems to perform queries with aggregations, on the condition that the query results theNLIDB returns are or can be transformed into tables.

s2_title: Predição de Irregularidade Fiscal dos Contribuintes do Tributo ISS
tldr: This work aims to assess the use of Machine Learning techniques in order to obtain accurate forecasts that estimate the risks of companies becoming debtors in the next fiscal year.

s2_title: Short Paper - Improving the Quality of the User Experience by Query Answer Modiﬁcation
tldr: The process reorga-nizes the original query answer by applying heuristics to summarize the results and to select template questions that create a user dialog that guides the presentation of the results.

s2_title: How can DB Systems be ready for privacy regulations
tldr: Some of the rights that highly impact the current design of DBMSs are described, and some of the challenges raised by these regulations are discussed, as well as related works and research opportunities.

s2_title: Uma Proposta de Mapeamento do Modelo Conceitual Entidade-Relacionamento Estendido para o Modelo de Dados NoSQL de Grafos
tldr: This article proposes a series of high-level algorithms for mapping elements of Extended Entity-Relationship conceptual model to a proper graph logical model, intended that the generated logical model is used as a tool for validation and verification of integrity constraints in graph databases (GDB).

s2_title: Publicação Diferencialmente Privada de Dados de Pacientes de COVID-19
tldr: Este trabalho irá demonstrar that é possível garantir a privacidade dos pacientes infectados e manter a utilidade dos dados, permitindo uma análise of qualidade sobre os mesmos.

s2_title: Reply to Kratz et al.
tldr: In this guideline, the global penetrance of germline TP53 variants has been overestimated and a stratified strategy is advocated, by recommending presymptomatic testing and the intensive protocol in childhood from birth, independently of the personal and medical history and type of TP53 variant.

s2_title: LGPD: A Formal Concept Analysis and its Evaluation
tldr: The results of applying formal concept analysis (FCA) to the Brazilian General Law for the Protection of Personal Data (LGPD) are detailed and an automatic manner to apply FCA is proposed.

s2_title: Streaming state management methods for real-time data deduplication
tldr: The experimental results show that it is necessary to use fast additional storage to persist the read keys, as long as they can appear, or to use the optimized storage, with a quick key search.

s2_title: Semantic Search on Scientific Repositories: A Systematic Literature Review
tldr: A systematic literature review of research efforts on mechanisms for supporting search for scientific papers, data and processes, based on extracting and analyzing the entire contents of Scopus and IEEE Xplore is presented.

s2_title: Prefacio / Preface
venue: Songs of Life and Hope/Cantos de vida y esperanza

s2_title: SAGAD: Synthetic Data Generator for Tabular Datasets
tldr: This paper presents a data augmentation method called SAGAD, based on conditional entropy, which can balance minority classes in conjunction with the increase of the overall size of the trainingset and presents an extension of SAGad for iterative learning algorithms, called DABEL, which generates new samples for each epoch using an optimization approach that continuously improves the model’s performance.

s2_title: SSL-VFC4.5: An approach to adapt the Very Fast C4.5 classiﬁcation algorithm to deal with semi-supervised learning
tldr: This work proposes an adaptation to the Very Fast C4.5 (VFC4.5) algorithm implementing on it a semi-supervised impurity metric presented in the literature, and points out that this adaptation can slightly increase the accuracy of the VFC4.5 when the datasets have the presence of a very few amount of labeled instances, but it increases the training time.

s2_title: Similarity Search and Correlation-Based Exploratory Analysis in EHRs: A Case Study with COVID-19 Databases
tldr: The Sketch method for comparing EHRs by similarity is proposed to provide a tool for a correlation-based exploratory analysis over different attributes, and it is shown to complement the similarity search task, identifying and evaluating patterns discovered from heterogeneous attributes.

s2_title: Simulating and visualizing infection spread dynamics with temporal networks
tldr: The findings support the need for a high social distancing compliance allied to the adoption of protective measures such as the use of face masks and a visual analytics approach for the simulation and analysis of infection spread dynamics that considers different infection probabilities and different levels of social Distancing.

s2_title: Uma Abordagem Híbrida para Predição de Gênero a partir de Textos em Português
sOCRates - a post-OCR text correction method
tldr: This work introduces sOCRates, a post-OCR text correction method that relies on contextual word embeddings and on a classifier that uses format, semantic, and syntactic features to accurately correct errors and improve retrieval results.

s2_title: Interpreting BERT-based stance classification: a case study about the Brazilian COVID vaccination
tldr: This paper proposes a BERT-based stance classification model and an attention-based mechanism to identify the influential words for stance classification and uses these metrics to assess if words with high attention weights correspond to domain intrinsic properties and contribute to the correct classification of stances.

s2_title: Detection of Misinformation About COVID-19 in Brazilian Portuguese WhatsApp Messages
tldr: This work presents the COVID-19.BR, a data set of WhatsApp messages about coronavirus in Brazilian Portuguese, collected from Brazilian public groups and manually labeled, and evaluated a series of misinformation classifiers combining different techniques.
venue: International Conference on Applications of Natural Language to Data Bases

s2_title: ACERPI: An approach for ordinances collection, information extraction and entity resolution
tldr: ACERPI is presented, an approach which identifies the people mentioned in the ordinances to help the user find the documents of interest and combines techniques to discover, obtain, convert and structure documents, extract information, and link employees entities.

s2_title: Applying Data Augmentation for Disambiguating Author Names
tldr: The proposal of data augmentation outperforms otherData augmentation approach, as well as improves some machine learning techniques that were not specifically designed for the author name disambiguation task.

s2_title: A distributed framework to investigate the entity relatedness problem in large RDF knowledge bases
tldr: DCOEPin KB is introduced, an in-memory distributed framework that addresses the entity relatedness problem and an evaluation of path search strategies using DCoEPinKB over real data collected from DBpedia provides insights about the performance of the pathSearch strategies.

s2_title: SEREIA - Busca por Palavras-Chave em Document Stores
Uma Abordagem de Anotação Semântica Automática Direcionada a Sistemas de Perguntas e Respostas
Inferencing Relational Database Tuning Actions with OnDBTuning Ontology
tldr: This research work first presents the OnDBTuning ontology solution focusing on the inference of tuning actions, and provides an actual implementation using SPARQL Inferencing Notation (SPIN).

s2_title: Textual-based DSL for Conceptual Database Modeling: A Controlled Experiment
tldr: A replicated controlled experiment is carried out to compare effort spent and quality, using the harmonic average between precision and recall, of the models produced with two different approaches for entity-relationship modeling.

tldr: This paper presents a rule-based conversion process from an EER schema to Neo4J schema constraints, as Neo4j is the most representative NoSQL graph database management system with an expressive data model.

s2_title: Stream and Historical Data Integration using SQL as Standard Language
tldr: This work presents a framework that allows the integration of streaming data and historical data in real-time, abstracting syntactic aspects of queries through the use of SQL as a standard language for querying heterogeneous sources.

s2_title: A Data Integration Architecture for Smart Cities
tldr: This work identifies the main requirements of a data integration system to support decision-making in cities, and proposes a new microservice architecture to support the development of software platforms for integrating smart cities’ heterogeneous data.

s2_title: MIDET: A Method for Indexing Traffic Events
tldr: A Method for Indexing Traffic Events (MIDET) for querying spatio-temporal data, whose location can be represented as a point or collection of points, which provides the following benefits: adoption of a simple bulk loading process to manage dynamic insertion streams, and in-memory spatial joins.

s2_title: The Application of Spatial Approximations to Spatial Query Processing: A Systematic Review of Literature
tldr: An overview and comparison of existing approaches that propose, evaluate, or make use of spatial approximations to optimize the performance of spatial queries and characterize them and discuss some future trends.

tldr: This ongoing work presents an architecture and methods of a system that supports the recommendation of the most suitable data system for an application and illustrates how the recommendation would work in a fictitious scenario.

Análise de métodos de tratamento de outliers para predição dos retornos de índices de ações negociados em bolsa
Avaliação de Dimensões de Qualidade de Dados para o Agronegócio
Em Direção a uma Abordagem para Avaliação da Saúde de Ecossistemas de Dados
Evaluating the cohesion of municipalities' discourse during the COVID-19 pandemic
Evaluation of Automatic Speech Recognition Systems
tldr: Evaluating the performance of commercial solutions for ASR that use deep learning models, such as Facebook Wit.ai, Microsoft Azure Speech, and Google Cloud Speech-to-Text shows that the evaluated solutions slightly differ.

Generalização de Mineração de Sequências Restritas no Espaço e no Tempo
HELIX: A data-driven characterization of Brazilian land snails
tldr: This study characterizes Brazilian land snails by morphometrical data features manually taken from the shells by using different learning models that labeled snail specimens with a precision up to 97.5% and indicates possible outliers physiologies due to climate traits and breeding.

s2_title: How COVID-19 Impacted Data Science: a Topic Retrieval and Analysis from GitHub Projects' Descriptions
tldr: A state-of-art algorithm is employed to find topics based on the repositories descriptions, and the performance of tuning its hyperparameters for better accuracy is compared.

Managing Sparse Spatio-Temporal Data in SAVIME: an Evaluation of the Ph-tree Index
tldr: This paper investigates the adoption of the Ph-tree as an in-memory indexing structure for sparse data, and compares the performance in data ingestion and in both range and punctual queries, using SAVIME as the multidimensional array DBMS.

s2_title: Núcleo de Fusão de Dados de um Gêmeo Digital da indústria de petróleo e gás
SentiProdBR: Building Domain-Specific Sentiment Lexicons for the Portuguese Language
tldr: An effective methodology using probabilities of the Bayes’ Theorem for building a set of lexicons, called SentiProdBR, for 10 different product categories for the Portuguese language, which significantly outperforms several alternative approaches of building domain-specific sentiment lexicons.

Um Estudo Sobre o Uso de Abordagens de Gerência de Dados em Sistemas de Análise Visual de Dados Espaço-Temporais
Uma proposta de data lake para pesquisa em saúde a partir de data pools multicêntricos interoperáveis
Anais Estendidos do XXXVI Simpósio Brasileiro de Banco de Dados (SBBD Estendido 2021)

tldr: This work proposes AFXGB, an Adaptive Fast binary classification algorithm using XGBoost, focusing on the fast induction of labeled data streams, maintaining the same accuracy and with the fastest recovery from concept drifts, thus preserving long-term accuracy.

Autonomic Combination and Selection of Tuning Actions
tldr: This work proposes an automated method for generating and selecting combined tuning solutions for relational databases that addresses how to mix solutions while still preserving both technological constraints and available computational resources.

s2_title: CoFFee: A Co-occurrence and Frequency-Based Approach to Schema Mining
tldr: The results show that CoFFee produces a summarized schema of good quality, outperforming the baselines by an average of 22% of the F1 score, and is compared with two state-of-the-art approaches.

tldr: It is concluded that the anti-vaccination movement in the US is more dominant in relation to Brazil, because the US population is more objective in defending their positions (health and safety versus individual freedom).

EBRES: Efficient Buffer Replacement with Exponential Smoothing
